name: create_memory
description: Store a new memory with a title and content, optionally scoped to a project and tagged.

arguments.name: title
arguments.desc: Short human-readable label for the memory.

arguments.name: content
arguments.desc: Full memory body — embedded for semantic search.

arguments.name: project_name
arguments.desc: Optional project scope (omit for global memories).

name: search_memories
description: Semantic vector search over stored memories, with optional project and tag filters.

arguments.name: project_name
arguments.desc: Filter to a specific project (omit = global search).

name: update_memory
description: Update the title, content, or tags of an existing memory by ID.

arguments.name: memory_id
arguments.desc: ID of the memory to update.

arguments.name: content
arguments.desc: New content body (omit to keep existing).

arguments.name: tags
arguments.desc: New tags list (omit to keep existing).

name: delete_memory
description: Permanently delete a memory by ID.

arguments.name: memory_id
arguments.desc: ID of the memory to delete.

name: list_memories
description: Browse stored memories with pagination (returns metadata only, no content).

arguments.name: project_name
arguments.desc: Filter to a specific project (omit = all projects).
